svg.title: Netbox auth flow — detailed
svg.desc: Full authentication pipeline from game client through PlayFab and Cloudflare Worker to Photon connection, with explanations at each step

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Netbox check if a token already exists?')
sendPrompt('How does Netbox log in to PlayFab?')
g.text: Uses device unique ID as the account key
Creates account automatically on first login

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does PlayFab return after login?')
g.text: Unique player ID stored in Auth.PlayFabPlayerId
Used to identify this player server-side

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does NetboxGenerateToken do in CloudScript?')
g.text: Checks platform, timestamp skew, player ID match

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the token sent back to the game client?')
sendPrompt('How does the game client connect to Photon?')
g.text: Photon forwards it to your Cloudflare Worker URL

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Cloudflare Worker check?')
g.text: Parses format, checks expiry, calls NetboxValidateToken
Checks token format, expiry, and HMAC hash
Hash proves token wasn't forged or tampered with

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when Photon allows a connection?')
sendPrompt('What happens when Photon rejects a connection?')
